title: cloezia artensis var. riparia
intro: Cloezia artensis var. riparia, also known as the riparian cloezia, is a plant species native to the island of Mauritius and is a variety of the Cloezia artensis plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal activities, as well as its ability to treat wounds and reduce inflammation. The riparian cloezia has been found to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve cardiovascular health, due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
